name: Vegan Christmas Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pineapple, citrons, peels, cherries, raisins & currants in a large bowl.
2. Add 1/2 cup grapefruit juice and mix very well. Cover and let stand overnight.
3. The next day, add the nuts and 1/2 cup of flour to the fruit mixture and mix well.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining flour with baking soda, salt, and cinnamon; mix well.
5. In another bowl, beat shortening for 30 seconds. Gradually add white sugar, creaming as you add it.
6. Stir in cornstarch. Add the beaten shortening and sugars to the fruit mixture.
7. Gradually stir in the flour mixture. Add almond extract and the remaining grapefruit juice; stir until well combined.
8. Preheat oven to 275°F (135°C).
9. Grease a 10-inch square cake tin. Line with brown paper and grease the paper.
10. Transfer the cake mixture to the cake tin and press down gently.
11. Bake for 3 hours, checking after two hours. If the top is browning too quickly, cover with waxed paper.
12. Remove from oven and place on a wire rack to cool for 30 minutes.
13. Gently remove cake from tin and peel away paper. Let cool completely on wire racks.
14. Wrap in waxed paper and keep in a cool place. If icing the cake, layer with marzipan and decorate as desired.
